hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "/Core/"; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct writes to /Core/ are prohibited. Escalate to ChatGPT/BERNARD per Escalation-Triggers.md"; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit" && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "(governance|core|engine|wiki|phase|fix|update):"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message must use a valid prefix (governance:, core:, engine:, wiki:, phase:, fix:, update:)"; exit 1; fi'
